title: Colorful Creakings
description: Allows dyeing resin, allowing creakings with different eye colors, and all varieties of dyed resin blocks.
body:
Colorful Creakings allows you to dye resin bricks and clumps to create all varieties of colored resin blocks, most importantly including a colored creaking heart.

The dyed Creaking Hearts function as the base game counterparts do, spawning a creaking, but with the eye color of the resin it's made with. Attacking this creaking will spawn resin of the same color too.
